issue.title: Lane refill: repo reality audit and delete-ready sweep for last Python residuals with exact validation evidence

conditions: Delete any tracked file matching .py, .pyi, .pyx, .pyw, pyproject.toml, setup.py, Pipfile, or requirements*.txt when it appears in the repository tree.
Do not delete markdown or JSON migration evidence solely because it references historical Python paths.

commands: find src/bigclaw tests scripts bigclaw-go/scripts -type f -name '*.py' 2>/dev/null | sort

blocker.summary: The repository-wide physical Python file count was already zero in the materialized origin/main checkout before BIG-GO-1470 changes.

notes: This lane documents an empty remaining Python asset inventory and hardens the Go-only state with regression coverage.
Historical markdown/JSON reports remain because they are audit evidence rather than executable Python assets.
Local and remote branch tips matched at commit 025fb05 after push.
